notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a fielder's choice. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Jakob Marsee advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Shane Smith.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks plunked
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks hit by pitch. Otto Lopez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez grounds into a force out, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to second baseman Chase Meidroth. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd.
